name: DA: Door-to-Door Governance Audit
objective: Verify service delivery standards and citizen satisfaction in Cape Town.
mainMessage: DA: Getting things done. We are auditing your neighborhood to ensure excellence in local government.
talkingPoints: Energy: Progress on load-shedding mitigation plans.
Safety: Expanding the local law enforcement presence.

name: DA: Ward 115 Community Hub
objective: Engage with local safety and neighborhood watch leaders.
mainMessage: Building Safe Communities: Stronger together through active citizenship.
talkingPoints: Crime: Data-led policing strategies for your sector.
Waste: Updates on the new recycling initiative.

name: DA: Cape Town CBD Broadcast
objective: Mass awareness of public transport shifts and SME support clinics.
mainMessage: DA: Supporting Small Business! Visit the Grand Parade tomorrow for our SME registration clinic.

name: DA: Excellence in Governance Rally
objective: Showcase the DA track record and outline the national prosperity plan.
mainMessage: The DA vision for South Africa: Competence, job creation, and service delivery excellence.
talkingPoints: Jobs: The plan to create 2 million real jobs.
Safety: A professional, devolved police service.
